evals.description: Trigger test: activates on SOC 2 audit preparation question
evals.prompt: We're a B2B SaaS company and our enterprise prospects keep asking for a SOC 2 report. We've never done this before. Where do we start?

evals.description: Trigger test: activates on HIPAA safeguards question
evals.prompt: Our startup just signed a contract with a hospital system and now we need to sign a Business Associate Agreement. What does HIPAA actually require us to implement technically?

evals.description: Trigger test: activates on PCI-DSS scoping question
evals.prompt: We're building an e-commerce site that takes credit card payments via Stripe. Do we need to be PCI-DSS compliant and if so what level?

evals.description: Core task: building a SOC 2 Type II timeline
evals.prompt: Our CEO committed to having a SOC 2 Type II report ready in 12 months. We have nothing in place today - no formal policies, no compliance tooling. Is 12 months realistic and what's the roadmap?

evals.description: Core task: conducting a risk assessment
evals.prompt: Our auditor says we need a formal risk assessment before the SOC 2 audit. What does that involve and how do we document it?

evals.description: Core task: automating compliance evidence collection
evals.prompt: We're drowning in manual work every time our auditor asks for evidence - exporting user lists, taking screenshots of settings, chasing managers for sign-offs. How do we automate this?

evals.description: Core task: scoping PCI-DSS cardholder data environment
evals.prompt: We just found out our payment processing flow actually sends raw card numbers through our API before forwarding to our processor. How does this affect our PCI-DSS scope and what should we do?

evals.description: Core task: managing an active audit
evals.prompt: Our SOC 2 auditor just sent us a 60-item evidence request list and wants everything in 2 weeks. How do we organize this and avoid common mistakes that delay the report?

evals.description: Gotcha: warns about treating compliance as one-time project
evals.prompt: We just passed our SOC 2 audit. We're thinking of shutting down our compliance tooling to save money and spinning it back up next year before the renewal. Is that a good idea?

evals.description: Gotcha: warns about shared accounts in regulated systems
evals.prompt: Our engineering team uses a shared admin account to access the production database for debugging. Our compliance team says this is a problem. Is it really a big deal?

evals.description: Gotcha: warns against skipping gap analysis before buying tools
evals.prompt: We're about to sign a $30k contract with a compliance automation platform. Should we just get started with the platform and figure out our controls as we go?

evals.description: References load: points to controls-matrix reference for SOC 2 mapping
evals.prompt: I need to build a controls matrix for our SOC 2 Type II audit that maps Trust Services Criteria to our specific controls and the evidence we'll collect. Where do I start?
